---
title: "Notes"
jupyter: diffeq_py
license: "CC BY-NC-SA 4.0"
---

This page contains the lectures notes for MATH 341 *Differential Equations*.

- [Section 1](https://math341diffeq.netlify.app/notes_01) introduces the basic idea of a differential equation with an emphasis on ordinary differential equations (ODEs).

- [Section 2](https://math341diffeq.netlify.app/notes_02) covers first-order ODEs inlcuding slope-fields, separable equations, linear equations, integrating factors, and applications.
